expectations.text: Proposes organizing files by type (documents, images, spreadsheets, etc.)
expectations.evidence: documents, images, spreadsheets, archives, other categories

expectations.text: Suggests a date-based or descriptive naming convention
expectations.evidence: Suggests 'Rename files to include a date prefix'

expectations.text: Provides a script or code to perform the organization
Uses pathlib or shutil for file operations (not raw os.system calls)
expectations.evidence: Uses os.listdir, os.path.join, os.makedirs. Uses shutil.move but os module is primary.

expectations.text: Handles edge cases like duplicate filenames
